trigger_keywords: qué puede causar una vendimia demasiado temprana

steps.label: cause
steps.text: Grapes are harvested before sufficient flavour and phenolic maturity has developed.

steps.label: mechanism
steps.text: Green-tasting and herbaceous compounds remain prominent because ripening has not reduced or balanced them with ripe fruit character.

steps.label: effect
steps.text: The resulting wine can show herbaceous or underripe aromas, sharper acidity, and less ripe fruit.

steps.label: exam_formulation
steps.text: Formative causal formulation: Harvesting before adequate flavour maturity can leave herbaceous, underripe characters in the wine.

_meta.source_note: Inferred formative model - not official WSET assessment or mark-scheme content
